topic: Tenses Part 4 — Mixed Tense Practice (All 12 Tenses)

options: I had been eating rice for an hour.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "मैं चावल खाता हूँ।" = "I eat rice."
Full sentence: "I am eating rice."
Correct sentence: "I have eaten rice."

questions.hindi: मैं एक घंटे से चावल खा रहा हूँ।
options: I have been eating rice for an hour.
questions.answer: I have been eating rice for an hour.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "मैं एक घंटे से चावल खा रहा हूँ।" = "I have been eating rice for an hour."
Full sentence: "I ate rice."
Correct sentence: "I was eating rice."

options: I had been eating rice for an hour.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "मैं चावल खा चुका था।" = "I had eaten rice."

questions.sentence: I had been eating _____ for an hour.
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "I had been eating rice for an hour."
Correct sentence: "I will eat rice."

options: I have been eating rice for an hour.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "मैं चावल खा रहा होऊँगा।" = "I will be eating rice."
Full sentence: "I will have eaten rice."

questions.sentence: I will have been eating rice for an hour yesterday.
options: I will have been eating rice for an hour yesterday.
I will have been eating rice for an hour.
questions.answer: I will have been eating rice for an hour.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I will have been eating rice for an hour."

options: She had been working for two hours.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "वह काम करती है।" = "She works."
Full sentence: "She is working."
Correct sentence: "She has worked."

questions.hindi: वह दो घंटे से काम कर रही है।
options: She has been working for two hours.
questions.answer: She has been working for two hours.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "वह दो घंटे से काम कर रही है।" = "She has been working for two hours."
Full sentence: "She worked."
Correct sentence: "She was working."

options: She had been working for two hours.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "उसने काम कर लिया था।" = "She had worked."

questions.sentence: She had been _____ for two hours.
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "She had been working for two hours."
